label: Two religious debates between a Moslem prince and a Christian monk in presence of the Caliph

work.desc_title: Two religious debates between a Moslem prince and a Christian monk in presence of the Caliph

note: Beginning of first debate lost. Second debate is between a monk (Ibrahim at-Tabarani) and a prince (Abd ar-Rahman ibn nbd al-Malik ibn Salih al-Hashimi). Subject of second debate is the sonship of Christ to God and God’s Trinity
